description: Frontier entropy threshold policy - DEFAULT SAFE MODE. Actuation disabled by default. All hard controls require explicit feature flag activation.

_comments.safety_model: This policy ships in OBSERVE-ONLY mode by default.
_comments.rationale: Entropy prediction F1=0.000 (POOR) - below governance threshold of >=0.75. Actuation GATED until recalibration.
_comments.activation: See .env.example for feature flags required to enable actuation.
_comments.governance: Platform Architecture Board approval required before enabling hard controls.

actions.message: Entropy velocity elevated to WATCH level
Entropy velocity elevated to WARNING level - consider convergence

_disabled_actions.reason: Entropy velocity WARNING - reducing frontier expansion

actions.message: CRITICAL: Entropy velocity critical - immediate intervention required

_disabled_actions.message: CRITICAL: Entropy velocity critical - immediate intervention required

actions.message: Instability predicted within 1 hour (LOW CONFIDENCE - entropy F1=0.000)
Instability predicted within 24 hours (LOW CONFIDENCE - entropy F1=0.000)

low.description: Low confidence predictions suppressed or flagged

_comments.enabled: Master kill-switch. Set to true ONLY after Platform Architecture Board approval.
_comments.dryRun: Safety net. Set to false ONLY in staging/production after successful dry-run validation.
_comments.feature_flags: Individual action categories require additional feature flags (see .env.example)

_comments.requireApproval: Manual approval is enforced at execution time even if action is policy-enabled. freeze_frontier ALWAYS requires approval.
_comments.calibration_gate: Entropy actuation is GATED until calibration achieves F1 >= 0.75 (current: F1=0.000)
_comments.board_approval: Platform Architecture Board approval required before setting actuation.enabled=true
